title: Consumer contract: terrain signals per H3 cell (v1)
description: Terrain context signals read from the H3 knowledge store by domain agents and the dashboard. Ingestor-written signals: ELEVATION_M, SLOPE_DEG, ASPECT_DEG, RUGGEDNESS_INDEX, DATA_CONFIDENCE. Agent-written derived signal: TERRAIN_CLASS. Consumers must never use terrain signals as the sole basis for operational recommendations — they are structural context only.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when this payload was assembled.

cells.description: One entry per H3 cell that has terrain signals in the store.

signals.description: Signal values keyed by signal name. All ingestor signals should be present; TERRAIN_CLASS is present only after the agent has run.

ELEVATION_M.description: Mean cell elevation above sea level in metres.

ASPECT_DEG.description: Dominant slope-facing direction in degrees. -1 = flat cell.

RUGGEDNESS_INDEX.description: Mean absolute elevation difference vs H3 k=1 ring neighbours, in metres.

DATA_CONFIDENCE.description: DEM data confidence for this cell. 0.90 = full coverage, 0.65 = void-filled.

TERRAIN_CLASS.description: Agent-derived terrain class. Null if the agent has not yet classified this cell.

dem_source.description: Which DEM product was used for this cell. 'mixed' means Copernicus and SRTM were blended.

last_ingested_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime of last ingest for this cell.

terrain_class_computed_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when the agent last wrote TERRAIN_CLASS for this cell. Null if not yet computed.

summary.description: City-level terrain summary statistics for dashboard display.

terrain_class_distribution.description: Count of cells per TERRAIN_CLASS value.

void_filled_cell_count.description: Number of cells where DATA_CONFIDENCE < 0.70 (void-filled or suspected artefact).

sources.description: List of DEM source IDs used in this payload.

synthetic_used.description: True if any synthetic or demo elevation data is present. Must trigger a warning in any dashboard consumer.

void_fill_notice.description: Non-null when void-filled cells are present. Dashboard must display this notice.
